title: Corrected Regime Analysis, Statistical Significance, and Mechanism Investigation for PRMP
summary: Demo notebook that loads pre-computed PRMP evaluation results (122 examples across 7 datasets) and re-runs statistical analyses: corrected regime analysis identifying degenerate/confounded FK links, bootstrap CI and paired t-tests for Amazon PRMP improvement (9.86% RMSE, Cohen's d=1.84), mechanism investigation (information filtering, implicit regularization, benefit decomposition), and hypothesis verdicts. Generates 4 publication-quality figures: diagnostic space, regime predictor vs improvement, ablation bar chart with bootstrap CIs, and mechanism decomposition. Uses pre-computed data from mini_demo_data.json loaded via GitHub URL with local fallback.
